title: ursinia subflosculosa
intro: Ursinia subflosculosa, also known as the small daisy or African daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the Western Cape Province in South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Ursinia subflosculosa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
